summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of HE CARES Foundation nonprofit website. Tested all 9 backend APIs and frontend functionality including forms, navigation, contact details, and donation flows. Fixed proxy configuration issue. All core features working correctly.

configuration_fixes.issue: Proxy target was pointing to port 8000 instead of 8001
configuration_fixes.fix: Updated target from localhost:8000 to localhost:8001

design_issues.issue: Volunteer form was not found on the volunteer page - may be implemented differently than expected
design_issues.status: Minor - volunteer API works via backend testing
